title: Turkey Fiesta Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy wrap recipe using leftover turkey and fiesta seasonings. Serve with your favorite toppings.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the fiesta seasoning and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add the shredded turkey and cook until heated through.
4. Warm the tortilla wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
5. Assemble the wraps by spooning the turkey mixture onto the tortilla, followed by the cheese, cilantro, lime juice, sour cream, avocado, and red onion.
6. Top with fiesta salsa and serve immediately.
